content.en:
Ancient Star Clan, Ancient Star Stone Space.

Ye Tian came here again and began to break through with the help of the Ancient Star Stone Origin.

At the same time, the Ancient Star Clan also prepared a variety of Eternal Origin Origins.

It's a pity that the Ancient Star Clan was sealed here, so there were very few Eternal Sources that could be found, and if it weren't for cultivating Ye Tian, they wouldn't have been able to come up with so many Eternal Source Origins.

Bang!!!!!

A large amount of Ancient Star Stone Origin poured into Ye Tian's body, and was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, causing Ye Tian's body to begin to change.

At this time, Ye Tian absorbed the origin of other eternal source objects into his body, making the changes in his body more and more drastic, and his aura becoming more and more powerful.

This is the process of being promoted from the invincible to the supreme.

Ye Tian's body condensed Ancient Star Eternal Body was in the upper rank Eternal Body, so once he broke through, the increase in strength would be extremely huge.

Inside the Ancient Star Tower.

Xing Ancestor's consciousness saw that Ye Tian was breaking through, and he was immediately very relieved.

Ye Tian's foundation was very solid, although the condensed Ancient Star Eternal Body was not very perfect, it was second only to him who he used to be.

As everyone knows, if Ye Tian wants to condense the flawless Ancient Star Eternal Body, he can also do it, but he needs to use the copy body to try to cultivate again and again, and improve it again and again, and he cultivates here in the Ancient Star Clan, so naturally he does not have such an opportunity.

Therefore, Ye Tian's Ancient Star Eternals actually had dozens of flaws, but it was still very powerful.

In terms of strength, the combat power of this body is not as good as the main body, and the gap is still a bit big, after all, the foundation and the perfection of the ancient astral body are not good, but it should not be far from the combat power of the Lord of the Void.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about this replica body at all, and he would definitely use it as a study in the future, so naturally he didn't care so much.

"Break through, when you step into the realm of the Sevenfold Supreme One, you can help me break a seal, and I can attack with all my strength from the seal and break the seal!" Xingzu said secretly.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough.

......

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, his copy body had already reached the Supreme Realm, although it was only a Supreme Realm, but in terms of strength, it should surpass the Ten Supreme Beings of the Ancient Star Clan.

However, he was not in a hurry to turn his face with the Gu Xing Clan at the moment.

After all, his current foundation in the Ancient Star Clan is too weak, even if he can defeat the Ten Supremes, he can't rule the entire Ancient Star Clan.

Therefore, he will slowly control the Ancient Star Clan and collect the eternal resources of the Ancient Star Clan.

In addition, Ye Tian annihilated the clone he left in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and used the Gu Xing Clan's body as a new clone.

In the following days, Ye Tian seemed to be a different person in the Gu Xing Clan, focusing on power and collecting resources, which made many supreme people gradually dissatisfied, but Xing Zu didn't care, he didn't really regard the Gu Xing Clan as his descendant at all.

The Gu Xing Clan was just a descendant of his aura evolution, all he needed was an assistant who could help him get out of trouble, so even if Ye Tian did too much, he wouldn't be a little unhappy.

As the years passed, Ye Tian had collected a lot of eternal resources, and the strength of this replicating body was also improving rapidly.

As for Ye Tian's body, he had also condensed the Endless Eternal Tribulation Body early, and his cultivation had reached the extreme, and he could become the Supreme Realm at any time.

Ye Tian was not prepared to delay, anyway, the fusion of the eternal body could also be carried out in the Supreme Realm.

He now needs to raise the cultivation of his ontology to the supreme realm, so that his strength will be strong enough to get more benefits.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian began to impact the Supreme Realm, and he directly expelled all the Void Sons from the Void Source Palace, and no longer let these Void Sons participate in the Void Source Monument.

Whoa!!

A son of the void was contemplating the Void Source Monument, but found that he was suddenly interrupted, and then he was removed from the Void Source Temple.

They were very puzzled, and wanted to enter the Void Source Temple, but found that they couldn't do it.

"What's going on?"

The ten children of the void were puzzled.

Immediately, they began to contact other Void Sons, and the other Void Sons did the same, and they couldn't enter the Void Source Hall at all.

Soon, a powerful Supreme One came out with the news that the Void Source Hall had an owner.

As soon as this news came out, a large number of Void Sons in the Source Sea were shocked.

For a long time, the Void Source Hall had no owner, but I didn't expect that now it had a master.

The ownerless Void Source Palace, they still dare to go in to see the Void Source Monument, now that there is a master, even if they let them in, they don't dare to go in!

Soon, the Children of the Void were very curious about who controlled the Void Source Palace.

Unfortunately, they couldn't find out.

------------------------

Source sea everywhere.

One by one, the Void Divine Sons were surprised to learn that the Void Source Hall had a master.

The Void Source Hall has existed for so many years, and only dozens of Void Divine Sons have been born, but none of the Void Divine Sons have been promoted to the Lord of the Void, so they can't control the Void Source Palace, but now suddenly a Void Divine Son has become the Lord of the Void and has controlled the Void Source Palace?

Who is this Lord of the Void?

However, they didn't think too much about it, even if they couldn't become the Lord of the Void, they could still continue to become stronger in the future, and they might not really be inferior to the mysterious Lord of the Void.

Inside the Void Source Temple.

Ye Tian came to the Void Source Tablet and began to absorb the Void Source Tablet according to the secret technique of the Void Source Ancestor, and at the same time took out a piece of the Void Source Heart.

After all, his body is not like the body of the Gu Star Clan, and it is 100% compatible with the origin of the Gu Star Stone.

Therefore, if he wants to forcibly ascend to the level of 100% fit, he must use the Void Source Heart.

Rumble!!!!!

The Void Source Heart was placed at the heart by Ye Tian and began to absorb and refine, so that the fit between the body and the Void Source Monument suddenly reached one hundred percent.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body felt the call of the Void Source Tablet's origin, which was the manifestation of reaching a 100% fit.

As a result, Ye Tian immediately absorbed the origin of refining the Void Source Tablet.

With a large number of Void Source Tablets being absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, Ye Tian was able to accommodate the origins of other Eternal Source Objects at this time.

There were hundreds of Eternal Source Objects in the Void Source Palace, even more than the Eternal Source Objects possessed by the Ancient Star Clan.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not lack the origin of the eternal source.

One Eternal Source Origin was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, making his foundation more and more terrifying, plus his Endless Eternal Body was only ranked in the middle of the Eternal Body, but it was the most perfect Eternal Body, and to a certain extent, it was much stronger than the Ancient Star Eternal Body with dozens of defects.

Therefore, Ye Tian broke through to the Supreme Realm, and his combat power would be extremely terrifying.

A large amount of resources were sent to Ye Tian under the control of the machine spirit, providing him with energy to break through the supreme being.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian completed a breakthrough.

He became a supreme being.

And at this time, the Dark Forbidden Domain seemed to have undergone some changes, and the origin of the Dark Forbidden Domain was suddenly much stronger, which was due to Ye Tian's breakthrough to the Supreme Realm, and the Dark Forbidden Domain received feedback.

But the breakthrough of just one person is far from being able to make the Dark Forbidden Realm qualitatively change, and it still takes two invincible people to break through to the Supreme One before the Dark Forbidden Realm will transform to the level of eternal heaven and earth.
